task.title: Setup observability stack
task.description: Deploy Prometheus, Grafana, and logging infrastructure for monitoring and observability

implementation.details: Deploy Prometheus Operator, Grafana with AlertHub dashboards, ELK/Loki stack for centralized logging, and Jaeger for distributed tracing.

task.acceptance_criteria: Metrics are scraped from all services, Grafana dashboards display data, logs are centralized and searchable, traces are collected
